result.summary: The page is mostly rendered, but a few horizontal layout issues make parts of the UI look cut off or obscured. The most noticeable problem is that some content is clipped at the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game grid.

issues.description: The right side of the category row is clipped, with the 'Hot Games' chip only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Add proper horizontal spacing or make the row horizontally scrollable with clear padding so the last chip is fully accessible.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the featured rows are cut off at the right edge, suggesting the content container is too narrow or overflowing horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Review responsive grid sizing and container width so cards either fit cleanly or scroll intentionally without being visibly chopped off.

issues.description: The sticky bottom navigation overlaps the main content, hiding the lower row of game cards behind it.
issues.suggestion: Increase bottom padding/margin on the content area to account for the fixed footer, or change the footer behavior so it does not cover content.
